videoSnippet.title: World Championship Match Will Be Fun! || Jorden vs Javokhir || Super Chess Classic Romania 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Van Foreest, Jorden (2735) - Sindarov, Javokhir (2776) 
Grand Chess Tour: Super Chess Classic Romania 2026 (Chess.com) [08] 2026.05.22
E06 Catalan, closed, 5.Nf3

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.g3 Be7 5.Bg2 O-O 6.O-O dxc4 7.Qc2 c6 8.Qxc4 b5 9.Qc2 Bb7 10.Rd1 Nbd7 11.Nc3 Qb6 12.e4 c5 13.e5 Nd5 14.Bg5 Nb4 15.Qb1 Bxf3 16.dxc5 Nxc5 17.Bxe7 Bxd1 18.Qxd1 Rac8 19.Bxf8 Kxf8 20.Ne4 Rd8 21.Qe2 Nxe4 22.Bxe4 Nc6 23.Rc1 Nxe5 24.Qh5 f5 25.h3 h6 26.Rc2 Qd4 27.Bg2 Qd1+ 28.Qxd1 Rxd1+ 29.Kh2 b4 30.Re2 Nd3 31.Rxe6 Nxf2 32.Re5 g6 33.Re6 Rd2 34.Rxg6 Rxb2 35.Rf6+ Ke7 36.Ra6 Nd1 37.Kg1 Nc3 38.Rxa7+ Kd6 39.Ra6+ Kc5 40.Rc6+ Kb5 41.Rxh6 Ne2+ 42.Kh2 Rxa2 43.Bd5 Rd2 44.Bf7 b3 45.Bxb3 Nd4+ 46.Kg1 Nxb3 47.Rh5 Nd4 48.g4 Kc4 49.gxf5 Kd3 50.Rh8 Ke3 51.Kf1 Nc2 52.Rb8 Rf2+ 53.Kg1 Nd4
